options.text: I understand that pre-registration and full payment are required to secure this seat in this Three Muses of Bluffton Sewing Class

I understand the 48-hour cancellation policy and that no refunds are issued for late cancellations or no-shows.  If the attendee is sick an unable to attend the class, please contact us so we may schedule them to make up the class.

props.name: photo_consent
props.label: Photos may be taken for marketing unless you opt out.

options.text: I understand that closed-toe shoes are required.
I understand that class materials are included only when stated.  All class materials are included with the Three Muses of Bluffton Sewing Class.
I understand classes require a minimum number of students to run.  In the event a class is unable to run we will notify you immediately.

props.name: injury_liability
props.label: I acknowledge that sewing involves the use of sharp tools and machinery and may result in injury. I voluntarily assume all risks associated with participation in sewing classes at The Three Muses of Bluffton. I release and hold harmless The Three Muses of Bluffton, its owners, employees, and instructors from any liability for injury, loss, or damage arising from participation. I agree to follow all safety instructions, studio policies, and instructor guidance.  Please type your name or Parent/Guardian's name below.
